prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(create_verification_case applicant_record_1)
(create_verification_case linked_record_1)
(assign_matching_service_to_case applicant_record_1 matching_service_instance_1)
(assign_matching_service_to_case linked_record_1 matching_service_instance_2)
(submit_document_for_matching applicant_record_1 travel_document_1)
(evaluate_applicant_exact_match applicant_record_1 exact_flag_1 travel_document_1)
(finalize_document_match_outcome applicant_record_1 travel_document_1)
(release_document_after_evaluation applicant_record_1 travel_document_1)
(submit_document_for_matching linked_record_1 travel_document_1)
(evaluate_linked_fuzzy_match linked_record_1 fuzzy_flag_1 travel_document_1)
(finalize_document_match_outcome linked_record_1 travel_document_1)
(release_document_after_evaluation linked_record_1 travel_document_1)
(assign_verifying_officer_to_case applicant_record_1 verifying_officer_1)
(officer_confirm_applicant_exact_match applicant_record_1 exact_flag_1 verifying_officer_1)
(release_verifying_officer_assignment applicant_record_1 verifying_officer_1)
(assign_verifying_officer_to_case linked_record_1 verifying_officer_1)
(officer_confirm_linked_fuzzy_match linked_record_1 fuzzy_flag_1 verifying_officer_1)
(release_verifying_officer_assignment linked_record_1 verifying_officer_1)
(generate_match_report applicant_record_1 linked_record_1 exact_flag_1 fuzzy_flag_1 match_report_1)
(submit_document_for_matching applicant_record_1 travel_document_1)
(acknowledge_match_report_for_document match_report_1 applicant_record_1 travel_document_1)
(mark_applicant_record_cleared applicant_record_1 match_report_1)
(mark_linked_record_cleared linked_record_1 match_report_1)
(issue_travel_document_token_to_case applicant_record_1 travel_doc_token_1 travel_document_1)
(finalize_clearance_and_release_service_for_applicant applicant_record_1 matching_service_instance_1 travel_doc_token_1)
(release_document_after_evaluation applicant_record_1 travel_document_1)
(submit_document_for_matching linked_record_1 travel_document_1)
(issue_travel_document_token_to_case linked_record_1 travel_doc_token_1 travel_document_1)
(finalize_clearance_and_release_service_for_linked linked_record_1 matching_service_instance_2 travel_doc_token_1)
(release_document_after_evaluation linked_record_1 travel_document_1)
(create_verification_case passenger_profile_1)
(create_verification_case passenger_profile_2)
(assign_matching_service_to_case passenger_profile_1 matching_service_instance_1)
(assign_matching_service_to_case passenger_profile_2 matching_service_instance_2)
(submit_document_for_matching passenger_profile_1 travel_document_1)
(finalize_document_match_outcome passenger_profile_1 travel_document_1)
(release_document_after_evaluation passenger_profile_1 travel_document_1)
(submit_document_for_matching passenger_profile_2 travel_document_1)
(finalize_document_match_outcome passenger_profile_2 travel_document_1)
(release_document_after_evaluation passenger_profile_2 travel_document_1)
(attach_external_verdict_to_profile passenger_profile_1 external_verdict_1)
(attach_payment_authorization_to_profile passenger_profile_1 payment_authorization_1)
(validate_policy_document_for_profile passenger_profile_1 policy_document_1 match_report_1)
(submit_document_for_matching passenger_profile_1 travel_document_1)
(assign_verifying_officer_to_case passenger_profile_1 verifying_officer_1)
(finalize_policy_validation_on_profile passenger_profile_1 policy_document_1 match_report_1 travel_document_1)
(process_payment_and_validate_profile passenger_profile_1 payment_authorization_1 verifying_officer_1 policy_document_1 match_report_1)
(attach_external_verdict_and_set_profile_flag passenger_profile_1 external_verdict_1 policy_document_1 match_report_1)
(finalize_profile_pre_adjudication passenger_profile_1)
(issue_travel_document_token_to_case passenger_profile_1 travel_doc_token_1 travel_document_1)
(finalize_clearance_and_release_service_for_profile passenger_profile_1 matching_service_instance_1 travel_doc_token_1)
(release_document_after_evaluation passenger_profile_1 travel_document_1)
(release_verifying_officer_assignment passenger_profile_1 verifying_officer_1)
(detach_payment_authorization_from_profile passenger_profile_1 payment_authorization_1)
(detach_external_verdict_from_profile passenger_profile_1 external_verdict_1)
(validate_policy_document_for_profile passenger_profile_2 policy_document_2 match_report_1)
(submit_document_for_matching passenger_profile_2 travel_document_1)
(assign_verifying_officer_to_case passenger_profile_2 verifying_officer_1)
(finalize_policy_validation_on_profile passenger_profile_2 policy_document_2 match_report_1 travel_document_1)
(attach_external_verdict_to_profile passenger_profile_2 external_verdict_1)
(attach_payment_authorization_to_profile passenger_profile_2 payment_authorization_1)
(process_payment_and_validate_profile passenger_profile_2 payment_authorization_1 verifying_officer_1 policy_document_2 match_report_1)
(attach_external_verdict_and_set_profile_flag passenger_profile_2 external_verdict_1 policy_document_2 match_report_1)
(finalize_profile_pre_adjudication passenger_profile_2)
(issue_travel_document_token_to_case passenger_profile_2 travel_doc_token_1 travel_document_1)
(finalize_clearance_and_release_service_for_profile passenger_profile_2 matching_service_instance_2 travel_doc_token_1)
(release_document_after_evaluation passenger_profile_2 travel_document_1)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem involves a name matching domain for tourism verification. The goal is to grant clearance to applicant_record_1, linked_record_1, passenger_profile_1, and passenger_profile_2.


## Investigating Name Matching

- The task centers on a name matching domain for tourism verification, focusing on granting clearance.
- Clearance is needed for applicant_record_1, linked_record_1, passenger_profile_1, and passenger_profile_2.

## Investigating Name Matching

- The task involves a hierarchy where applicant_record_1, linked_record_1, passenger_profile_1, and passenger_profile_2 all relate to name_verification_case.
- Each entity is part of a chain: applicant_record_1 and linked_record_1 are under applicant_group, while passenger_profile_1 and passenger_profile_2 link to linked_group, both ultimately tied to name_verification_case.

## Examining Verification Process

- Clearance for all four entities requires steps like adjudication_complete and issuing travel_document_token to make them clearance_eligible.
- Actions like create_verification_case and automated_name_match_completed are relevant, with preconditions ensuring no prior verification_case_created or clearance_granted.

## Analyzing Shared Resources

- All entities share resources like match_report_1, but differ in policies and manual_override notes.
- The process must account for profile links, such as passenger_profile_1 and passenger_profile_2 both connecting to applicant_record_1 and linked_record_1.

## Examining Verification Process
- Clearance for profiles requires finalize_clearance_and_release_service_for_profile, needing clearance_eligible and case_assigned_matching_service.
- Profiles must have automated_name_match_completed, often via finalize_document_match_outcome, which needs a matching service allocated.

## Analyzing Service Allocation
- There are only three services for four cases, raising concerns about matching for passenger_profile_1 and passenger_profile_2.
- Profiles may rely on the match_report from linked records, potentially avoiding separate matching service allocation.

## Sequencing Clearance Steps

- To clear all entities, process applicant_record_1 and linked_record_1 first using two services, then use released services for passenger_profile_1 and passenger_profile_2.
- Finalizing clearance for records releases services, allowing reuse for profiles, addressing the issue of only three services for four cases.

## Managing Shared Resources

- Only one travel_doc_token_1 is available, requiring sequential issuance and release during clearance to manage for all entities.
- Shared resources like supporting_document_1 and external_verdict_1 must be allocated carefully, as some, like manual_override_note_2, may not be initially available.

## Sequencing Document Handling

- Processing applicant_record_1 and linked_record_1 requires sequential document handling with travel_document_1, starting with submission for case evaluation.
- After evaluation and matching (exact for applicant, fuzzy for linked), documents are released, making travel_document_1 available for the next case.

## Managing Officer Assignments

- Only one verifying_officer_1 is available, requiring sequential assignment to applicant_record_1 and linked_record_1 for confirmation.
- After each verification (exact match for applicant, fuzzy for linked), the officer is released for reuse in the next case.

## Extending Document Handling  
- After clearing applicant_record_1, travel_document_1 remains evaluated but needs release for reuse, achieved via release_doc_after_evaluation.  
- For linked_record_1, travel_document_1 is submitted again for evaluation, ensuring case_doc_eval is set before clearance.  

## Finalizing Clearance Process  
- Finalize_clearance_and_release_service releases matching services and travel_doc_token_1, making them available for other cases like passenger_profile_1 and passenger_profile_2.  
- Both applicant_record_1 and linked_record_1 achieve clearance, with services and tokens freed for profile processing.  

## Managing Profile Clearance  
- Passenger_profile_1 and passenger_profile_2 require creating verification cases and assigning available matching services, such as matching_service_instance_1 and matching_service_instance_2.  
- Unlike records, profiles lack direct exact or fuzzy flags; their matching relies on linked match_report from applicant_record_1 and linked_record_1.  

## Evaluating Profile Validation  
- Profiles need automated_name_match_completed, potentially through document submission, despite no specific evaluate_xxx function for passenger_profile.  
- Validation proceeds via validate_policy_document_for_profile, requiring auto-completed profiles and linking to existing match reports and policies.

## Issuing Tokens for Profiles  
- Issuing travel_document_token_1 to passenger_profile_1 requires case_doc_eval and token availability, linking travel_document_1.  
- After issuance, finalize_clearance_and_release_service_for_profile makes matching_service_instance_1 and token available again, while document remains evaluated.  

## Releasing Resources for Profiles  
- To free resources for passenger_profile_2, detach_payment_authorization_from_profile and similar actions release payment_authorization_1 and external_verdict after use with passenger_profile_1.  
- Releasing the verifying officer and detaching external verdict ensures single resources (payment, external verdict, officer) are available for sequential profile processing.  

## Managing Policy Documents  
- Policy documents (policy_document_1 for passenger_profile_1, policy_document_2 for passenger_profile_2) are initially available and linked, but validate_policy makes them unavailable without a release action.  
- Finalize_policy_validation_on_profile requires no match_report_variant_flag_1, which is met as the report lacks flags, ensuring validation proceeds.  

## Handling Eligibility and Flags  
- Attach_external_verdict_and_set_profile_flag sets checks_completed but not fare_eligibility_ready, as it avoids variant flags var1 and var2, following the current path.  
- Without fare_eligibility_ready, the process skips fare-related actions, moving directly to finalize_pre_adjudication without additional fare code attachment.

## Releasing Resources for Profiles
- After processing passenger_profile_1, actions release resources like verifying_officer_1, payment_authorization_1, and external_verdict_1, making them available for passenger_profile_2.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
